name: Compile and Upload Kubeflow Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches: [ main ]

jobs:
  build-and-deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
    - name: Checkout Code
      uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - name: Set up Python
      uses: actions/setup-python@v4
      with:
        python-version: '3.9'

    - name: Install Dependencies
      run: |
        python -m pip install --upgrade pip
        if [ -f requirements.txt ]; then pip install -r requirements.txt; fi
        pip install kfp  # Ensures the SDK is available for the upload

    - name: Compile Pipeline YAML
      run: |
        # Generates the mlflow_kubeflow_pipeline.yaml
        python throughkubeflow_mlflowloggging_withoutcache_v1.py

    - name: Upload and Execute Pipeline
      run: |
        python -c "
        import kfp
        import time
        
        host_url = 'https://filling-risk-lingo.ngrok-free.dev'
        client = kfp.Client(host=host_url)
        
        pipeline_name = 'iris-classifier-automated'
        file_path = 'mlflow_kubeflow_pipeline.yaml'
        run_name = f'automated-run-{int(time.time())}'
        experiment_name = 'Iris-Experiments'

        # 1. Get or Create Experiment
        try:
            exp = client.get_experiment(experiment_name=experiment_name)
            experiment_id = exp.experiment_id
        except Exception:
            exp = client.create_experiment(name=experiment_name)
            experiment_id = exp.experiment_id

        # 2. Upload/Fetch Pipeline and Version
        try:
            # Uploading returns the version object in v2
            pipeline_version = client.upload_pipeline(
                pipeline_package_path=file_path,
                pipeline_name=pipeline_name
            )
            pipeline_id = pipeline_version.pipeline_id
            version_id = pipeline_version.pipeline_version_id
            print(f'Uploaded Version ID: {version_id}')
        except Exception:
            # If upload fails because version exists, fetch latest
            pipelines = client.list_pipelines()
            pipeline_id = next(p.pipeline_id for p in pipelines.pipelines if p.display_name == pipeline_name)
            versions = client.list_pipeline_versions(pipeline_id=pipeline_id)
            version_id = versions.pipeline_versions[0].pipeline_version_id
            print(f'Using Existing Version ID: {version_id}')

        # 3. Trigger the Run (Providing both IDs as required)
        try:
            run_result = client.run_pipeline(
                experiment_id=experiment_id,
                job_name=run_name,
                pipeline_id=pipeline_id,
                version_id=version_id  # This satisfies the KFP v2 error
            )
            print(f'Run successfully triggered!')
        except Exception as e:
            print(f'Failed to trigger run: {e}')
        "
